name: Scholar's Deep
publicReputation: The greatest repository of knowledge in the world.
description: Atlantis's center of learning, magical research, historical preservation, scientific advancement, and ruin study.
dmSecret: The deeper one travels within Scholar's Deep, the harder it becomes to tell who truly controls the flow of information.

name: The Council of Tides
description: The primary governing body of the Surface Realm, made up of representatives from merchant guilds, noble houses, religious groups, military leadership, major settlements, and independent fleets.
dmSecret: The Council has prevented wars for generations, but it also protects its own interests and may not know the full truth about Atlantis.

name: Tidewarden Academy
publicReputation: The training ground of Atlantis's protectors.
description: The military academy where recruits train in combat, tactics, law enforcement, survival, monster identification, patrol work, and Tidewarden discipline.
dmSecret: Several recruit records have been altered or erased. The original bodies occupied by the player characters were not ordinary academy students.

name: Merchant Consortium
description: A loose alliance of major trading houses operating throughout both the Surface Realm and Deep Realm.
dmSecret: Some merchant captains know far more about vanishings, restricted routes, and illegal salvage than they admit.

name: Royal Archives
description: A restricted collection of royal documents, ancient records, sealed military files, diplomatic agreements, and classified historical accounts.
dmSecret: Several records about the Drowned Ward, Operation Tidefall, and the original recruits have either been altered, sealed, or removed.

name: Zarik's Kelp Garden
description: A popular shop selling kelp blends, Dr. Kelp drinks, Diet Dr. Kelp, and magical Kelp Shrooms.
dmSecret: Academy recruits frequently buy from Zarik behind their instructors' backs.

name: The Salty Eel Tavern
publicReputation: A beloved underwater tavern known for food, drink, gossip, and trouble.
description: A bustling Atlantean tavern where recruits, sailors, dockworkers, merchants, and off-duty Tidewardens gather.
dmSecret: The Salty Eel is one of the easiest places to seed rumors about missing records, strange patrols, and unofficial missions.

name: Coral Forge Armory
publicReputation: Reliable weapons and armor for Tidewardens and civilians.
description: A respected armory producing tridents, shields, armor, blades, and underwater combat equipment.
dmSecret: The armory may eventually reveal unusual orders for equipment that official logs do not explain.

name: The Gilded Kelp Tavern
publicReputation: An old tavern lost when the Drowned Ward was sealed.
description: Once a rival establishment to the Salty Eel, now abandoned in the ruins of the Drowned Ward.
dmSecret: Laughter is sometimes heard inside because smugglers still use parts of the old tavern as a concealed meeting point.
